EU Exempts Apple Watch and AirPods from Battery Removal Requirements

As reported by mjtsai.com, the EU has exempted Apple Watch and AirPods from battery removal requirements. This is a significant development in the tech sector, and it highlights the importance of sustainability. According to mjtsai.com, this exemption is a testament to the value of design for recyclability and the importance of protecting the environment.
